summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.manager; public class TrainingVerification { public static void main(String[] args) { TrainingManager tm = TrainingManager.getInstance(); System.out.println("--- Training Verification ---"); String nnResult = tm.trainNeuronNetwork("TestNN", tm.getTestData().get("nn")); System.out.println(nnResult); String llmResult = tm.trainLLM("TestLLM", tm.getTestData().get("llm")); System.out.println(llmResult); String agentResult = tm.trainAgent("TestAgent", tm.getTestData().get("agent")); System.out.println(agentResult); System.out.println("--- Verification Complete ---"); } }
